name: Iced Tea
recipeInstructions:
To make tea easily, fill a gallon container with water and add 5-6 tea bags. Refrigerate overnight.
Alternatively, bring about 2 cups of water to boil, add the tea bags, and let boil for 10-15 seconds. Cover, then let stand for about 30 minutes. Fill a gallon container three-quarters full with water, add the hot tea and tea bags, and top off with water. Leaving the tea bags in prevents scum from forming on the tea.
Home Remedy: Tea contains theophylline, which is a bronchodilator. Therefore, it's good for breathing problems, colds, etc. Instant tea does not contain theophylline.
Taken from: IT NEVER TURNS OUT THE SAME WAY COOKBOOK
A Collection of Recipes from the Kitchen of Joyce and Clem Kohl
